notes: proposal_bundle_v1 is the canonical reviewable designer proposal state before sequence_agent plan construction.
Proposal bundles must be revision-aware so stale proposals can be regenerated safely.
Proposal lines remain human-reviewable summaries rather than raw xLights command payloads.
Assumptions must remain explicit so broad but usable conversational prompts stay reviewable rather than opaque.
Lifecycle must record whether the bundle is fresh, stale, or rebased against sequence revision changes.
